productDisplayName: Status Quo Men Check Navy Blue Shorts
description: Composition White and teal blue check shorts made of 100% cotton, has a flat front with insert pockets on the sides, welt pockets on the back with button flaps, cargo pockets on the thighs with buttoned flaps, comfortable waistband with loops and drawstring on the inside, black stitch detailing, embroidered brand logo on the right thigh pocket flap, appliqued brand tab on the back on the waistband, and a button and zipper closure on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in warm water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium hot iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery White and teal blue checks give a vacation vibe to these shorts from status quo. The insert pockets on the sides, the cargo pockets on the thighs and black stitch detailing gives an edge to these utilitarian additions. Crafted from 100% cotton, the fabric offers exemplary comfort. Team these with tees in solid colours. Model statistics The model wears shorts of length 21" Height: 6'; Waist: 32"
